---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for VertexOS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or friction you hit. ("I'm always frustrated when…")

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. Mockups, sketches, and reference links welcome.

## Which area does this touch?

- [ ] Discovery / Generator
- [ ] Generation quality (Design Brief / Design DNA / industry engine)
- [ ] Studio Mode
- [ ] Studio Editor
- [ ] Export / deployment
- [ ] New design system
- [ ] New industry
- [ ] Docs / other

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is better.

## Roadmap check

Have you read [ROADMAP.md](../../docs/ROADMAP.md)?

- [ ] Yes — this isn't already planned, and it doesn't conflict with the non-goals (no paid hosting, no required login, BYOK stays)
